side_effects.description: Feeling more fatigued than usual, reduced energy levels
Increased muscle soreness and reduced recovery

protocol_notes: OP takes ~10g (half recommended dose) mixed into protein shake after evening exercise. Took a deload week to rule out overtraining but fatigue persisted. No other dietary or lifestyle changes reported. Product contains amino acid profile typical of collagen: Glycine 4740mg, Proline 2720mg, Hydroxyproline 2280mg, Glutamic acid 1933mg, Alanine 1800mg, Arginine 1587mg, etc. No tryptophan.
